text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop by the cafeteria and find Nishino Flower
lining up a sizable selection of Japanese desserts.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer. Just look at all this sugary goodness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A bunch of folks from the shopping district gave
them to me. They told me to eat up so I could
grow up big and strong.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll be able to finish it all... But I need
to do my best. I have to repay their kindness by
eating everything and growing taller...
choice_data_list: You shouldn't force yourself to overeat.
Eating well is essential for growth!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's true... Even potted flowers wilt if you
water them too much...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'll work on this pile each day instead of
binging on it all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower is able to enjoy her gifts
without overdoing it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'll soldier through and show them just how
big and strong I can get!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
First, I want to grow tall enough to write on the
blackboard without needing a step stool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower shows her appreciation by
eating all the desserts in one sitting.
